Compliance.description: FSP 15261 licensed non-life insurer under FSCA; part of regulated Telesure Group; no major 2025/26 violations or excessive Ombudsman complaints found; long track record since 2004.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 4.46/5 (4.4k reviews), TrustIndex 9.7; Ask Afrika Top Insurer 2025/26; mixed app reviews but strong service feedback.

Product Value.description: Competitive pricing from R216 basic; comprehensive value with safety benefits/GBV donation; transparent online quotes; broad women-centric range.

Innovation.description: Guardian Angel app with crash detection, roadside tracking, panic button, trip monitor; auto claims notification; updated 2025.

Customer Support.description: Call center, app chat/claims; phone 0861 lines; reviews praise agents.

Accessibility & Security.description: POPIA compliant FSP, Guardian Angel app security (account managed), no major breaches; digital access inclusive.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: From R216/mo basic; personalized quotes at firstforwomen.co.za

socialSentiment.summary: Positive reviews on HelloPeter/app; recognized as top insurer; engaged safety community.
